SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-03-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:18am
Small Claims appeals, Judge Pro Tem Robert Stump, nothing on record, clerk-Beth Wilber.
Cause called for small claims appeals: Appellant, Chan Soon Bang, appears in Pro Per; Respondent, Ron Vernali (dba Genesis construction services)appears with counsel George Engler, Esq. Parties previously sworn testify in the narrative. Mr. Engler assists Mr. Vernali by asking him questions.
EXHR(A) Letter requesting payment
10:40am
Evidence retained, matter is submitted.
